description: Explore Bitcoin dominance, a key metric in the crypto world, reflecting market trends and investor sentiment. Understand its significance as Bitcoin reaches a four-year high dominance of 63%. Learn how to use this metric to gauge market cycles and the implications of institutional interest in Bitcoin.
topic_summary: Bitcoin dominance, currently at 63%, indicates investor sentiment and market trends. It reflects a cautious market where capital flows into Bitcoin as a safer asset compared to altcoins. Tracking this metric can help predict market cycles and potential altcoin seasons.
